item.title: Trixie - Cat Activity Tunnel Feeder - Comedero de túnel para gatos
item.description: Tienes Trixie - Cat Activity Tunnel Feeder - Comedero de túnel para gatos aqui! 🔎: Alimento cae fuera del recipiente y se distribuye en los tubos 6.^Cat Activity Tunnel Feeder, ø28 cm/14 cm .^Cat Activity Tunnel Feeder, ø28 cm/14 cm . 🛒 Comprar!!! Check the price of this item in other countries: 🇬🇧 United Kingdom | 🇺🇸 USA | 🇩🇪 Germany | 🇪🇸 Spain | 🇫🇷 France | 🇮🇹 Italia | 🇦🇪 Arab Emirates | 🇨🇦 Canada | 🇧🇪 Belgium | 🇳🇱 Neederlands | 🇵🇱 Poland | 🇸🇪 Sweden |
